objective: Fix three critical data quality issues that make the Competitor Intelligence UI unusable: (1) products_full_json is NULL for all records, (2) account_type column missing from records table causing SQL crash, (3) pricing matrix shows 0 entries because product data is names-only.

completed: Session 1-4: Competitor Intel refactoring — 83 tests green, Crawlee-based pipeline live
Session 5 (Sprint 1-5): Competitor Intelligence UI built — 3 tabs at /fiori/intelligence
API layer: 6 endpoints at /api/competitor-intel/ (overview, vendors, records, products, timeline)
Route added: /fiori/intelligence in main.tsx + FioriShell nav
gaps: ISSUE 1: products_full_json is NULL for all 2 existing records — data was ingested before the column migration
ISSUE 2: account_type column missing from records table — causes SQL crash in getVendorSummaries() at lib/competitor-intel-ui.ts:116
ISSUE 3: products_json stores names-only arrays ["유튜브 프리미엄","유튜브 프리미엄",...] — no prices, no durations
DB: artifacts/competitor-ads/competitor-ads.db has 2 records, both with NULL products_full_json, no account_type column
Schema has 13 columns in records table — account_type was never added

decisions_locked: Do NOT modify the parser — it already correctly extracts prices, durations, tiers, constraints, account_type from HTML
Do NOT modify the sync adapter's productsFull passing — it already works
The fix is schema-level (add account_type column) + data re-population (re-run ingestion to populate products_full_json)

implementation_plan.action: Add account_type TEXT to SCHEMA in lib/competitor-ad-sqlite.ts
Add ALTER TABLE migration for account_type in openDatabase() (same pattern as products_full_json migration on lines 56-61)
Update insertRecord() to accept and store account_type field
Pass account_type from dataset item to insertRecord() — add account_type: record.account_type to the insertRecord call
Re-run data ingestion to populate products_full_json and account_type. Check if Crawlee Dataset still has data, or re-ingest from CSV/HTML source
Verify: npx tsc --noEmit clean, 83 tests pass, products_full_json has data, account_type column exists, Pricing tab shows prices

acceptance_criteria: products_full_json contains full AdProduct objects with price_krw, duration_months, etc.
account_type column exists in records table
Pricing tab shows non-zero price entries
Vendor cards display correct account type tags (direct_login/family_share/group_invite)

key_code_references.parser_extracts_products: lib/competitor-ad-parser/ppomppu-parser.ts:147-217 — extractProducts() already produces PpomppuProduct[] with name, price_krw, duration_months, price_per_month_krw, constraints, plan_tier
key_code_references.insertRecord_signature: lib/competitor-ad-sqlite.ts:71-103 — insertRecord() accepts productsFull? but NOT account_type
key_code_references.vendors_sql_crashes: lib/competitor-intel-ui.ts:116 — SELECT vendor, COALESCE(account_type, 'unknown') as type FROM records GROUP BY vendor, type
key_code_references.products_full_json_migration_pattern: lib/competitor-ad-sqlite.ts:56-61 — ALTER TABLE pattern for reference

data_ingestion_note: Before re-running ingestion, check if Crawlee Dataset still has data: `npx tsx -e 'const {Dataset}=require("crawlee"); (async()=>{const ds=await Dataset.open(); const items=await ds.export(); console.log("Dataset items:", items.length); console.log("First item products:", JSON.stringify(items[0]?.products, null, 2));})();'`. If Dataset is empty, need original CSV/HTML source data.
next_actions: Add account_type column to schema + migration
Re-run data ingestion to populate products_full_json + account_type
Verify UI shows correct data in Pricing tab and Vendor cards
